# First Crack Documentation

## 한국어

- [사용 가이드](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/)

- [시스템 사양](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/start/system-requirements/)
- [macOS 설치](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/start/install-mac/)
- [Windows 설치](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/start/install-windows/)
- [로스팅 머신 연동 개요](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/machines/)
- [Modbus 연동](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/machines/modbus/)
- [Phidget 연동](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/machines/phidget/)
- [Artisan 설정 가져오기](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/machines/artisan/)
- [시리얼 포트 드라이버](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/machines/serial-driver/)
- [연동 문제 해결](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/machines/troubleshooting/)
- [요금제](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/service/plans/)
- [구독 · 결제](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/service/billing/)
- [환불 규칙](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/service/refund/)
- [이용약관 요약](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/service/terms/)
- [문의하기](https://docs.firstcrackiscoming.com/support/contact/)
